did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a retrospective survey and critical analysis of existing literature on incorporating colour information for computer-aided diagnosis of melanoma. It reviews prior studies that used computer vision, feature extraction, and machine learning (e.g., artificial neural networks, bag-of-features) but does not present new experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML methods itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
